sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_empty_arrays (id UInt32, arr Array(UInt64));
INSERT INTO test_empty_arrays (id, arr) VALUES (1, emptyArrayUInt64());
SELECT id, arr FROM test_empty_arrays WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_empty_arrays SET arr = emptyArrayUInt64() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_empty_arrays WHERE arrayEmpty(arr);
